description: Secure free or subsidized weekly venue for Thursday events (6:00–9:30 PM). Target Nimman-area venues that benefit from bringing in 30-50 high-spending founders weekly.
target_segment: Bars, restaurants, rooftops, coworking event spaces, and private clubs in Nimman and nearby CM areas that have capacity for 40-60 people and benefit from recurring evening foot traffic

for_venue: Guaranteed 30-50 people every Thursday evening (6:00–9:30 PM)
High-earning, internationally mobile crowd (avg spend above typical walk-in)
Regular recurring reservation — no uncertainty on Thursday nights
Brand association with a curated professional community
Optional: venue mention in RSVP confirmations to 300+ members
what_we_ask: Dedicated space for 40-60 people (standing or seated for presentations)
Basic AV: projector or screen, or we bring our own
No venue hire fee — revenue comes from food/drink sales

steps.subject: 40 founders every Thursday — venue partnership inquiry
steps.body:
Hi {{contact_name}},

I run CM Founders — a weekly event for Chiang Mai's founder and digital nomad community. Every Thursday evening we bring together 30-50 vetted attendees: founders, creators, and remote entrepreneurs.

We're currently rotating venues across Nimman and looking to settle into a consistent weekly home.

Here's what the partnership looks like:
- We bring 40-50 people, every Thursday, 6:00–9:30 PM
- No venue hire fee — all revenue is yours (food, drinks, bar)
- We list {{venue_name}} in our communications to 300+ community members
- It becomes a regular standing reservation, no uncertainty on your Thursday nights

Is {{venue_name}} open to hosting recurring events? Happy to come by and walk through the space this week.

steps.subject: Re: 40 founders every Thursday — venue partnership
steps.body:
Hey {{contact_name}} — just following up on the venue inquiry.

Last Thursday we had [COUNT] attendees — mix of SaaS founders, agency owners, and content creators, most living here long-term or staying 1-3 months.

If it helps to see the space in person before deciding, I'm happy to meet at {{venue_name}} any afternoon this week.

Would that work?

steps.subject: Closing the loop on venue partnership
steps.body:
Hey {{contact_name}},

Last message on this — totally understand if the timing or layout isn't a fit.

If things change or you'd like to revisit this for a future season, feel free to reach out. We're always looking for the right venue home.

Hope to see you at an event sometime.

steps.subject: Weekly event partnership — CM Founders
steps.body:
Hi {{contact_name}},

I run CM Founders, a weekly curated event for Chiang Mai's founder community. We're looking for a regular Thursday evening venue (6:00–9:30 PM, 40-50 attendees).

Coworking spaces are an ideal fit — you already serve our audience, and hosting our events puts your space in front of 300+ active community members who are constantly looking for a workspace home.

What we offer:
- Direct exposure to vetted founders who may become long-term members
- Recurring Thursday evening booking (no uncertainty in your calendar)
- Community listing in RSVP confirmations

What we need:
- Event space for 40-60 people
- No hire fee (we're happy to promote your membership options to attendees)
- Access 5:30 PM–10:00 PM

Is this something {{venue_name}} would be open to exploring?

steps.subject: Re: Weekly event partnership — CM Founders
steps.body:
Hey {{contact_name}} — following up on the event partnership.

We currently rotate between a few spaces in Nimman but are looking to lock in a consistent home for Q2 and beyond.

{{venue_name}} has come up positively in our community — a few of our members work here already.

Would a quick call or walkthrough this week make sense?

steps.subject: Confirmed — CM Founders at {{venue_name}} starting [DATE]
steps.body:
{{contact_name}},

Great — we're locked in. Here's the standing agreement summary:

**Venue:** {{venue_name}}
**Day/Time:** Every Thursday, 6:00–9:30 PM
**Start date:** [DATE]
**Expected attendance:** 30-50 per event

**Our setup needs:**
- Space cleared/ready by 5:30 PM for setup
- [AV requirements: projector/screen, or we BYO]
- Dedicated area for presentations + networking

**What we'll do:**
- List {{venue_name}} in RSVP confirmations (300+ members)
- Tag you in event social posts
- Encourage attendees to order food/drinks

I'll be in touch the week before the first event to coordinate setup logistics.

Looking forward to making this a regular thing.

steps.subject: Thursday setup — quick confirm for this week
steps.body:
Hey {{contact_name}},

Just confirming we're all set for Thursday:

- Arrival: 5:30 PM for setup
- Event: 6:00–9:30 PM
- Expected count: ~[RSVP_COUNT] confirmed

Anything I should know or coordinate on your end before we arrive?

See you Thursday.
